text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
During my rise to power as the next<n>king, my
compatriot, Meisho Doto,<n>suddenly storms the
stage! But then,<n>just as we are establishing our
leading roles...

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
I-impossible! The Golden Generation<n>will bow out
of the Twinkle Series this<n>year! Meaning... the
battlefield shall<n>shift to the Dream Trophy
League?!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
This news overshadows my<n>achievements. I
cannot let this stand!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
I call a press conference and make<n>my
declaration! I shall amass G1<n>victories, become
king, and put an<n>end to the Golden Generation's
reign!
